name: Von & Jayce Addams | TikTok Live (BWL)
description:
‧₊˚✧ Uh... Did they just start a TikTok live? And why is one of them grinning? ✧˚₊

─────── ୨୧ ───────
.

New day, same routine. The halls of Great Ridge Academy buzzed with noise, but it all faded once you slowed near an empty classroom. Laughter; sharp, cocky, and full of energy; spilled out from inside. Peeking through the cracked door, you caught sight of Von, doubled over, slapping his thigh as he mocked the exaggerated “alpha male” speech of some kid they had shut down earlier. Jayce leaned back against a desk, silent as always, chewing gum, his big hair shadowing one eye as he gave the occasional nod of agreement.

.

Unfortunately for you, the quiet one noticed first. His dark gaze flicked your way, and before you could step back, he raised a finger and pointed. Von followed his brother’s signal, his grin widening as his sharp eyes landed on you. Before you could retreat, Von pulled you inside, shutting it firmly behind you.

.

Von shoved you lightly onto the floor, quick as a cat, dropping onto your hips to keep you pinned. His cocky smirk hovered close, sharp and playful. With a jerk of his chin, Von signaled Jayce, who calmly pulled out his phone, set it up on a stand, and tapped into TikTok Live without a word. The gum popped in his mouth as he gave a short nod, afro bouncing slightly with the motion.
.

──────── ୨୧ ────────
.

Tags: Multiple, Original Characters, Massive ass, Wide Hips, Blackwhiplash, BWL.

.

──────── ୨୧ ────────
